title: Section 12
content: 1[12. Location of the Institute. -- (1) The existing Institute shall be located at New Delhi. (2) All corresponding Institutes shall be located at the places mentioned in column (3) of the Table given under section 27A. (3) All Institutes [other than the existing Institute and corresponding Institutes referred to in sub-sections (1) and (2)] shall be located at such places as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, specify.]
footnote: . Subs. by Act 37 of 2012, s. 13, for section 12 (w.e.f. 16-7-2012).
